zh.lifeSummary: Sir Adam De CHETWYND of Cublesdon, Knight是John de Chetwynd和Miss Stafford的兒子，於1229年出生在英國英格蘭史洛普爾謝特德。他於1256年與Cecilia在英國結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1282年12月28日在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾吉波萊斯同享年53歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Sir Adam De CHETWYND of Cublesdon, Knight是John de Chetwynd和Miss Stafford的儿子，于1229年出生在英国英格兰史洛普爾謝特德。他于1256年与Cecilia在英国结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1282年12月28日在英国英格兰斯塔福爾吉波萊斯同享年53岁。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: CHETWYND
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Chatwin
meanings: English (Warwickshire and Staffordshire): habitational name from a place in Shropshire called Chetwynd, from the Old English personal name Ceatta + Old English (ge)wind ‘winding ascent’.

nameMeanings.name: Sir
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Old Norse, originally a byname meaning ‘bride, wife’; in mythology the name of Thor's golden-haired wife.

nameMeanings.name: Adam
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: Sir Adam De CHETWYND of Cublesdon, Knight was born in 1229, in Chetwynd, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom as the son of John de Chetwynd and Miss Stafford. He married Cecilia in 1256, in England. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died on 28 December 1282, in Kibblestone, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 53.

fr.lifeSummary: Sir Adam De CHETWYND of Cublesdon, Knight est né en 1229, à Chetwynd, Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, fils de John de Chetwynd et Miss Stafford. Il a épousé Cecilia en 1256, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé le 28 décembre 1282, à Kibblestone, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 53 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Sir Adam De CHETWYND of Cublesdon, Knight wurde 1229 in Chetwynd, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom, als Sohn von John de Chetwynd und Miss Stafford geboren. Er hat 1256 in England Cecilia geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb am 28. Dezember 1282 im Alter von 53 Jahren in Kibblestone, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Sir Adam De CHETWYND of Cublesdon, Knight è nato il nel 1229 nel Chetwynd, Shropshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito come figlio di John de Chetwynd e Miss Stafford. Lui sposato Cecilia nel 1256, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì il 28 dicembre 1282, nel Kibblestone, Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 53 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Adam De CHETWYND of Cublesdon, Knightは1229年にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアチェトウインドでJohn de ChetwyndとMiss Staffordの息子として生まれた。1256年にイギリスでCeciliaと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1282年12月28日にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアキブレストーンで53歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Adam De CHETWYND of Cublesdon, Knight(은)는 1229년 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 쳇w이드에서 John de Chetwynd(와)과 Miss Stafford의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1256년 영국에서 Cecilia(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1282년 12월 28일 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 키브블레스톤에서 53세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Sir Adam De CHETWYND of Cublesdon, Knight nasceu em 1229, em Chetwynd, Shropshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom filho de John de Chetwynd e Miss Stafford. Ele casou-se com Cecilia em 1256, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 28 de dezembro de 1282, em Kibblestone, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 53 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Sir Adam De CHETWYND of Cublesdon, Knight родился в 1229 г. в местности четвинд, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания. Его родителей звали John de Chetwynd и Miss Stafford. Он женился на женщине по имени Cecilia в 1256 г. в местности Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер 28 декабря 1282 г. в местности кибблестоун, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 53 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Sir Adam De CHETWYND of Cublesdon, Knight nació en 1229, en Chetwynd, Shropshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido como hijo de John de Chetwynd y Miss Stafford. Se casó con Cecilia en 1256, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió el 28 de diciembre de 1282, en Kibblestone, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 53 años.
